title: April 12th, 2019 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
    - professional
        - mulled lyrics
            - i do not fit the mold
            - i do not get the mold
            - i did not set the mold
            - and i will not let the mold
            - hold me like that without getting my consent first
            - i'm scheming on my demons when i see em
            - screaming when they beg me to keep em secret
            - when they fiendin for my attention
            - i look around them, scanning my surroundings
            - they need me, i don't need em
            - so you know me, i'm trying to lead em
            - to that good life, you know that light we call freedom
    - professional
